ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the county record was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "bedroom_count" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "min_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bedrooms in the property type */,
  "max_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bedrooms in the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "property_category" TEXT /* Category of the property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the property type in the county */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Average price per square foot of the property type in the county */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_prices_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_prices_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property listing */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold) */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing agent */,
  "property_features" TEXT /* Additional features of the property (e.g., pool, garage) */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_listings_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_listings_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_listings_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property listing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property listing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property listing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the property listing */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the property listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES property_listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., county records, real estate listings) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or file path of the data source */,
  "last_import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last imported */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the source */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_listings" (
  "agent_listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent listing */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_listings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES property_listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property listing being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property listing was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the property listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES property_listings ("listing_id")
)
